scripts.test:e2e:gui: npm run seed:gui && npm run build && GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_E2E_SERVER_MODE=start GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_DATA_DIR=../data/gui-test GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_VPS_QUOTA_GB=${GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_VPS_QUOTA_GB:-1024} GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_LTE_QUOTA_GB=${GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_LTE_QUOTA_GB:-50} GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_BILLING_RESET_DAY=${GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_BILLING_RESET_DAY:-1} playwright test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:perf: npm run seed:gui && GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_DATA_DIR=../data/gui-test GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_VPS_QUOTA_GB=${GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_VPS_QUOTA_GB:-1024} GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_LTE_QUOTA_GB=${GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_LTE_QUOTA_GB:-50} GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_BILLING_RESET_DAY=${GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_BILLING_RESET_DAY:-1} playwright test tests/e2e/performance.spec.ts --project=desktop
scripts.test:gui:all: npm run seed:gui && npm test && npm run build && npm run verify:timezone && GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_DATA_DIR=../data/gui-test npm run verify:aggregates && GHOSTROUTE_CONSOLE_DATA_DIR=../data/gui-test npm run bench:dashboard && npm run test:e2e:gui && npm run test:perf
